name: @listmonk-ops/operations
description: Shared typed operations for listmonk-ops CLI and MCP adapters

scripts.build: bun run clean && ttsc --emitDeclarationOnly && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=neutral --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --minify --external:@listmonk-ops/openapi --external:zod
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run build && bun run test
